summary: Iteration 269: My Jobs Dashboard feature fully verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All 11 features tested and working - tabs, filters, job cards, action buttons, toast notifications, Recovered badge.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays content initially - minor UX issue, does not block functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Tab order is correct - My Space -> My Jobs -> Profile Settings -> Security -> Notifications
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/user-jobs returns jobs with all required fields for dashboard display
VERIFIED: Filter stats bar shows accurate counts: All (50), Completed (28), Assets Ready (4), Failed (18), Active (0)
VERIFIED: Job cards display status badge, title, date, credits, animation style, and stage progress bars
VERIFIED: Stage progress bars correctly show green=completed, red=failed, grey=pending
VERIFIED: PARTIAL (Assets Ready) jobs show Preview and Resume buttons with correct data-testids
VERIFIED: Completed jobs show green Video download button
VERIFIED: Failed jobs with server restart show 'Recovered' badge with amber background
VERIFIED: Resume button POST /api/pipeline/resume/{job_id} works - shows toast 'Job resumed from last checkpoint!'
VERIFIED: Job status updates after resume (PARTIAL -> Processing, progress shown with percentage)
VERIFIED: Refresh button (data-testid='refresh-jobs-btn') present and functional
VERIFIED: All filter buttons have correct data-testids: job-filter-all, job-filter-COMPLETED, job-filter-PARTIAL, job-filter-FAILED, job-filter-active
VERIFIED: jobs have has_recoverable_assets flag for Preview button logic
VERIFIED: jobs include crash_logs array for detecting server restart interruptions

FEATURE_1_MY_JOBS_TAB.position: Between My Space and Profile Settings

FEATURE_2_USER_JOBS_API.returns: 50 jobs with status, stages, has_recoverable_assets, crash_logs

FEATURE_4_FILTER_BUTTONS.filtering: Correctly filters job list when clicked

FEATURE_8_RECOVERED_BADGE.message_shown: Job interrupted by server restart. Credits refunded.

FEATURE_9_RESUME_FUNCTIONALITY.behavior: Job status changes from PARTIAL to PROCESSING

seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing 50 pipeline jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 269: My Jobs Dashboard feature fully tested and working. Tab position verified (between My Space and Profile Settings). All filter buttons working with correct data-testids. Job cards display all required info including stage progress bars. Resume button successfully resumes jobs with toast confirmation. Recovered badge appears on jobs interrupted by server restart. Video download button on completed jobs, Preview/Resume buttons on PARTIAL jobs. Backend API returns all required fields (status, stages, has_recoverable_assets, crash_logs, fallback_outputs). 50 pipeline jobs for test user.
